name: Green Beans and Celery Root Salad with Mustard Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 1 pound haricots verts (thin green beans), trimmed and cut into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, mustard, and salt. Gradually add the olive oil while continuing to whisk.
2. Cut off both ends of the celery root and remove the peel. Rinse and dry the celery root, then halve it lengthwise. Slice the celery root crosswise into 1/8-inch slices and cut those slices into 1/8-inch strips. Add the celery root to the dressing and toss until well coated.
3. In a saucepan of boiling salted water, cook the haricots verts for about 4 minutes or until crisp-tender. Drain the beans well. Add the haricots verts to the celery root mixture with salt and pepper to taste, and toss well.
